name: Baste and Bake Chicken (Inspired by Boston Chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients together and warm them in a small pan or microwave until the honey is melted and mixed into the marinade.
2. Arrange 4 chicken breast halves skin-side up on a greased baking dish that measures 9 inches by 9 inches.
3. Bake uncovered at 400°F for about 35-40 minutes, basting each piece with the marinade every 8-10 minutes until nicely browned.
4. Immediately after removing from the oven, cover the dish with foil and let it stand for 10-15 minutes before serving.
Note: This recipe serves 4 without leftovers. Nutritional information per serving: 159.6 calories; 2.7 grams total fat (0.9 grams saturated fat); 28.5 grams protein; 0.3 grams carbohydrates; 73 milligrams cholesterol; 63.3 milligrams sodium.
